docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,909.85 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MCCULLY, CHARLENE D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
